text:
miwi        2009-12-13 00:21:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/trac-autocomplete Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The AutocompleteUsersPlugin allows AJAX completion of users
  for the owner and CC fields on new and existing tickets.
  
  WWW: http://trac-hacks.org/wiki/AutocompleteUsersPlugin
  
  PR:             ports/141254
  Submitted by:   Eygene Ryabinkin <rea-fbsd at codelabs.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2491    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +45 -0     ports/www/trac-autocomplete/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/trac-autocomplete/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/www/trac-autocomplete/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/www/trac-autocomplete/pkg-plist (new)
